subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the twentieth... O moth of the heavenly Candle! In this cycle of existence and age of divine manifestation, through all ranks and stations, ascent and advancement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که بتاریخ بیست ... ای پروانه شمع آسمانی ، چون کور وجود و دور شهود در جميع مراتب و شئون عروج و صعود
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
